item.title: Respect your seniors to cash in on changing demographics
item.author: THE SUNDAY TIMES
item.description: The sector benefits from strong barriers to entry such as patents, regulation and long-established relationships with healthcare providers. For broader exposure, global healthcare funds such as the Xtrackers MSCI World Health Care ETF offer diversification across pharmaceuticals, medical devices and healthcare. Demographics are also reshaping consumer behaviour. As people move into later life, spending tends to shift to essentials such as healthcare, housing, financial security and everyday services.
